intro.headline: Yassine EL HANAFI
intro.description: Full Stack Software Engineer specialized in Java, Spring Boot, and Angular, with experience building financial and workflow-based applications in Agile environments. Comfortable across backend services, REST APIs, databases, and frontend integration, with a focus on clean code, maintainability, and production-ready delivery.

experience.heading: Work experience
experience.intro: Enterprise roles with clear scope, technologies, and measurable outcomes.

nexpublica.title: Full Stack Engineer
bullets: Worked on end-to-end financial workflow features for a platform used by local government authorities, including invoice creation, validation, liquidation, status transitions, payment deadlines, and budget-related business rules

Investigated and resolved functional and technical issues across frontend, backend, database, and workflow layers in Agile/SCRUM delivery
